## <JargonTip term="model cascading">Model Cascading</JargonTip> & Routing

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<ExpandableSection title="Cascading Examples" icon={'\uD83D\uDD00'}>
  - Customer support: FAQ/status \u2192 mini, complaints/escalation \u2192 full
  - Document processing: extraction \u2192 mini, analysis/summarization \u2192 full
  - Code review: style/lint checks \u2192 mini, logic/security review \u2192 full
</ExpandableSection>
